>Submitter-Id:	current-users

>Synopsis:	ports/153743: www/bluefish: fix pkg-plist
>Severity:	non-critical
>Priority:	low
>Category:	ports
>Class:		sw-bug
>Release:	
>Environment:	
>Description:
The following files are not included:
/usr/local/lib/bluefish/charmap.la
/usr/local/lib/bluefish/charmap.so

ports/153743 has been closed because a new version has been committed, but I can still see the problem.

After looking at configure, it seems that those files are built if gucharmap is installed.

>How-To-Repeat:
# cd /usr/ports/www/bluefish && make install && make deinstall
>Fix:
